Palmer Penguins Bill Dimensions Analysis

Reproducible Research Team

2026-05-22

Source: vignettes/report.Rmd
report.Rmd

Introduction

Analysis of bill length and bill depth measurements across three penguin species from the Palmer Station Antarctica LTER.

Data Loading 

library(palmerpenguins)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Source analysis functions from R/
source("../../R/bill_analysis.R")

# Preview data
head(penguins)

Analysis

Bill Dimensions by Species 

# Generate plot using function from R/
plot <- create_bill_plot()
print(plot)

# Save plot
ggsave("../figures/bill_scatter.png", plot, width = 8, height = 6)

Summary

The analysis reveals distinct bill dimension patterns across penguin species.

On this page

Developed by Ronald G. Thomas.
